title: Add FLOSS funding manifest
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds a funding.json v1.1.0 manifest for Pollinations and Myceli AI OÜ.
- Requests up to $100,000 yearly for open infrastructure and maintainer engineering.
- Keeps bank, payment, and tax details private until an award is approved.
- Uses current product and traction facts without the stale no-auth claims from the earlier draft.

Validation: `npx biome check --write funding.json`; `jq empty funding.json`.

gist.headline: A seed packet for the commons
gist.blurb: The hive now has a proper FLOSS funding manifest. It explains what open infrastructure needs to keep growing, while keeping the sensitive paperwork safely off the garden path.
gist.summary: Added a funding.json v1.1.0 manifest for Pollinations and Myceli AI OÜ, documenting up to $100,000 in annual FLOSS funding needs for open infrastructure and maintainer engineering.
gist.impact: Potential funders can now discover a current, machine-readable funding profile while banking, payment, and tax details remain private until an award is approved.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy community garden noticeboard displays a small funding manifest as a seed packet for sustaining open infrastructure. Polly, wearing a tiny gardener hat and carrying a watering can, tends code-plants beside the board; a locked little document box represents private award paperwork, with flowers and a warm retro terminal nearby.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener hat, watering code-plants beside a community garden noticeboard labeled 'FUNDING.JSON'; a small locked document box sits safely nearby. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, pixel flowers and a softly glowing terminal, nostalgic but beautiful.
